name: Comparison
summary: Class for comparison between two objects

methods.name: Congruent
methods.signature: Congruent(l1p1, l1p2, l2p1, l2p2) | Congruent(l1, l2)
methods.summary: compare 2D points of two 2D lines if are congruent
methods.remarks: compare 2D points of two 2D lines if are congruent

returns.doc: true if lines are congruent, otherwise false.

methods.name: DeterminePosition
methods.signature: DeterminePosition(geoObject_object, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(line, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(axis, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(polyline, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(polyline, point, tolerance, segment) | DeterminePosition(arc, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(arc, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(clothoid, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(spline, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(polygon, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(polygon, line) | DeterminePosition(line, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(polyline, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(phed, point) | DeterminePosition(spline, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(spline, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(path, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(b, point, tolerance) | DeterminePosition(polygon1, polygon2) | DeterminePosition(line, minMax) | DeterminePosition(lines, minMax) | DeterminePosition(igeo_object, point, tolerance)
methods.summary: Determine the relative position of a point to an object.
methods.remarks: Determine the relative position of a point to an object.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: tolerance (if distance < tolerance, point on object)

returns.doc: eOnElement(between start and end points), eEqualToStartPoint, eEqualToEndPoint, eLeft, eRight, eAbove, eBelow

methods.name: Equal
methods.signature: Equal(el1, el2) | Equal(el1, el2) | Equal(el1, el2) | Equal(el1, el2) | Equal(el1, el2) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(el1, el2, tol) | Equal(path1, path2, tol) | Equal(igeo1_object, igeo2_object, tol)

methods.name: EqualDistance
methods.signature: EqualDistance(el1, el2, tol) | EqualDistance(el1, el2, tol)
methods.summary: compare 2 2D points using their distance with given tolerance
methods.remarks: compare 2 2D points using their distance with given tolerance

methods.name: EqualRel
methods.signature: EqualRel(el1, el2) | EqualRel(el1, el2, tol) | EqualRel(el1, el2) | EqualRel(el1, el2) | EqualRel(el1, el2) | EqualRel(el1, el2)
methods.summary: compare 2 doubles using built-in relative tolerance
methods.remarks: compare 2 doubles using built-in relative tolerance

methods.name: GetSegmentNumber
methods.signature: GetSegmentNumber(geoObject_object, segment, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(geoObject_object, point, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(geoObject_object, point, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(line, point, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(line, point, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(polyPoints, point, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(polygon, point, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(polyPoints, point, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(spline, point, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(line, segment, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(line, segment, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(polyPoints, segment, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(polyPoints, segment, tolerance) | GetSegmentNumber(geoObject_object, segment, tolerance)
methods.summary: Determine the segment position of a point to a 2D geometry object
methods.remarks: Determine the segment position of a point to a 2D geometry object

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: tolerance (if distance < tolerance, point on object)

methods.name: IsInside
methods.summary: Determine if the line is inside the polygon
methods.remarks: Determine if the line is inside the polygon

returns.doc: true, if the line is inside the polygon

methods.name: IsParallel
methods.signature: IsParallel(el1, el2) | IsParallel(lines) | IsParallel(el1, el2) | IsParallel(el1_object, el2_object)

methods.name: Overlapped
methods.signature: Overlapped(el1, el2) | Overlapped(el1, el2, partiallyToo=False) | Overlapped(pp1, pp2) | Overlapped(pp1, pp2) | Overlapped(line1, line2) | Overlapped(line1, line2, partiallyToo=False) | Overlapped(arc1, arc2) | Overlapped(arc1, arc2) | Overlapped(phed1, phed2) | Overlapped(el1, el2) | Overlapped(geo1_object, geo2_object)

methods.name: AllPointsAreOneAxis
methods.summary: Check if all points of polyline are on one straight line
methods.remarks: Check if all points of polyline are on one straight line

methods.name: HitsElement
methods.summary: Check if comparison result hits element in some way
methods.remarks: Check if comparison result hits element in some way

returns.doc: true, if the result indicates that the element is hit, otherwise false e.g. left, right, etc.

params.name: a
params.doc: Number of which to compute sign
